coordinate_basis.source: HYG equatorial Cartesian coordinates scaled from parsecs to light years
coordinate_basis.z: +Z toward north celestial pole, epoch/equinox J2000

selection.real_stars: top 3000 brightest HYG v4.1 stars by visual magnitude
selection.game_systems: all systems from assets/data/galaxy/star_systems.json merged when coordinates match within 0.25 ly, otherwise added from game atlas coordinates
